sources.title: THRILLER! The Cleaner | FULL MOVIE | 2021| Shiloh Fernandez, Luke Wilson, Lynda Carter
sources.description:
When middle-aged house cleaner Buck Enderly takes on an eccentric new client, he gets roped into locating her estranged son. Buck tracks down the disturbed young man but in another twist of fate becomes an accomplice to a violent crime.

Edited for YouTube ad standards

The Cleaner features a dream cast for retro TV & movie fans, including: 
King Orba
Shelley Long (Cheers)
Lynda Carter (our forever Wonder Woman)
Luke Wilson (Old School, Legally Blonde, The Royal Tenenbaums)
Eden Brolin (Yellowstone)
Hopper Penn
Soleil Moon Frye (Punky Brewster)
Shiloh Fernandez (Red Riding Hood, Evil Dead)
M.C. Gainey
Mike Starr
James Paxton

#lyndacarter #lukewilson

metadata.Plot: Buck Enderly's life hasn't worked out the way he planned. He's a middle-aged house cleaner living with his mother, whom he must care for after she suffers a debilitating injury. When Buck takes on an eccentric new client, he gets roped into a side job locating her estranged son. With the help of his twenty-something neighbors, Buck tracks down the disturbed young man. But then in another twist of fate, he finds himself an accomplice to a violent crime. Now Buck must hide the truth from his family, including his younger brother - a local police officer.
metadata.Actors: Luke Wilson, Eden Brolin, Shelley Long
